infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NepTranslate needs the microphone to translate spoken Nepali and English.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: NepTranslate uses speech recognition to translate what you say.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NepTranslate does not need your photo library for translation. This description is required because included iOS frameworks reference photo-library APIs; NepTranslate will not access your photos unless you explicitly choose to share an image in a future update.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NepTranslate to access your microphone for speech translation.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow NepTranslate to recognize your speech for translation.
